item.title: 功能感知的中间填充作为编码代理基础模型的中间训练
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12463v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Coding agents must integrate external tool returns into ongoing reasoning - a capability that standard left-to-right pretraining on code exposes only in its forward direction. We observe that the action-observation-continuation loop of a coding agent is structurally iso
